case_title: YOLANDA CASTANEDA VS. CARMEL PARTNERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CASTANEDA, YOLANDA AS TO DEFENDANT CARMEL PARTNERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, YOLANDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($0.00) SERVED SEP-25-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARMEL PARTNERS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DILINDA VINZA SILIMA--COMMUNITY MANAGER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARMEL PARTNERS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, YOLANDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARMEL PARTNERS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
